import subprocess, time
users = ['root','ubuntu','admin','ctf','flag','user','guest','test','oracle','www-data','sysadmin','support','dev','db','service','mysql']
results = {}

        times.append(time.time() - start)
    results[user] = sum(times)/len(times)
for user, avg in sorted(results.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True):
    print(f"{user} {avg:.3f}")
